description: Return a list of all equipment logs for a specified project

project_id.description: ID of the project the equipment was logged for

managed_equipment_id.description: Equipment Id the log is associated with

onsite.description: The date equipment arrived on site

offsite.description: The date equipment leaves the site

updated_at.description: Date the equipment log was updated

created_at.description: Date the equipment log was created

deleted_at.description: Date the equipment log was deleted

formatted_offsite.description: The formatted date equipment left on site

formatted_onsite.description: The formatted date equipment arrived on site

inspection_date.description: The date the equipment was inspected

induction_checklist_list_id.description: Id of the inspection list the equipment uses

induction_number.description: The number used for equipment induction

induction_status.description: Indicates if the equipemnt has been successfully inspected and allowed to perform work
